pr.title: 1.1888 BPB via SP-4096 compression + stride-64 sliding window

output.summary: SP-4096 tokenizer plus stride-64 sliding-window eval on an 8-layer GQA with Muon delivers 1.1888 post-quant val bpb within the 16MB cap.
techniques: SP-4096 tokenizer slashes tokens/byte to 0.30 for compression gains
Stride-64 sliding-window eval gives ~960-context overlap to lower cross-entropy
8-layer 512-dim GQA with skip connections trained using Muon optimizer
